build.//buildCommand: Two concerns: (1) `npm install` not `ci` because Railpack mounts /app/node_modules/.cache and ci's wipe EBUSYs the mount. (2) --include=dev because Railway sets NODE_ENV=production at the service level, which makes `npm install` skip devDependencies — without it autoprefixer/tailwindcss/typescript/postcss aren't on disk and next/font fails with 'Cannot find module autoprefixer'.
build.//: watchPatterns are evaluated relative to the repo root. Limiting to HOA-RESIDENTS/** stops sibling-app changes from triggering a redeploy of this service.

deploy.//: Next.js standalone server (PWA). Same shape as HOA-ENTERPRISE.
